title: WATERFrAMES: Multimedia Displays
description: This mod only adds a Frame and a Projector where you can put video or image URLs and frame shows it
body:
[![CF downloads](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/waterframes.svg?badge_style=for_the_badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waterframes) [![CF current version](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/v/834607?style=for-the-badge&label=curseforge&labelColor=2d2d2d&color=e04e14)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waterframes/files) [![Minecraft versions supported](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/Supports_waterframes_all.svg?badge_style=for_the_badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waterframes/files) [![Discord server](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/https://discord.gg/cuYAzzZ)](https://discord.gg/cuYAzzZ)

🖼️ WATERFrAMES | MULTIMEDIA DISPLAYS

Your mod for image displaying, show pictures, videos, gifs and more in multiple and unique blocks, using URLs and a confortable interface to rotate, set transparency, brightness, or the audio distance, display your videos with a confortable experience, synchronized with you and your friends and fully designed to work for server-admins and in survival mode. Heavily inspired in [LittlePictureFrames](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/littleframes) [Join to my discord community](https://discord.gg/cuYAzzZ), and share your screenshots of you and your friends watching movies or memes, and your cinema buildings.

🎁 CONTENT OF THE MOD

- 📺 Multiple ways to show images (Frames, Projectors, TVs and Big TVs) - 🎮 Items (Remote Control) and commands (`/waterframes`) to control the frames from far away - 📂 Local files support _(powered by WATERMeDIA)_ using `water://local/` - 📺 VideoPlayer support - 🔗 Compatible with Youtube, Twitch, Kick.com, Google Drive, One Drive, Twitter (X) and \[orange\_page\] - 🛡️ Good managment for server admins (url whitelist, gamemode permissions, etc) - ⚙️ Fully customizable and configurable image (rotation, transparency, brightness and more) - ⏱️ Easy to use and compatible with other mods having video support (WATERMeDIA)

🧩 DEPENDENCIES

- [CreativeCore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creativecore): GuiAPI and Networking - [WATERMeDIA](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/watermedia): Multimedia Support

🖥️ SHOWCASE VIDEO (ENGLISH)

🖥️ SHOWCASE VIDEO (ESPAÑOL)

🕹️ PLAY WITH YOU AND YOUR FRIENDS

**Get a server at just 1$ to get a 15% discount and make a theater with your friends** [![KineticHosting sponsor code WATERMoDS](https://i.imgur.com/2WFmJzc.png)](https://www.kinetichosting.net/)

⁉️ FAQ

- ¿How can I play local files? - Modpacks can use a relative path using a `water://local/`, root is the modpack folder, so if you place your modpack intro in `config/mymodpack/video.mp4` you must replace `` with that path - ¿Can you backport to 1.16.5? - No, I refuse to go under 1.18.2. I am open for commisions for it but it has a high price. - Can keep maintaining the Fabric port for 1.21.4? - No, fabric was a headache since I started the port, and for the good sake of my mental sanity, I stopped maintaining it. - When I put a video, block shows a picture saying "Failed to Load VLC" - If you run on Linux or Mac, you must install VLC manually, if you run on windows or you already installed VLC on the mentioned OS please [submit a issue here](https://github.com/WaterMediaTeam/watermedia)

🎀 SPECIAL THANKS TO

- [**Wayerspork**](https://lifeonlinesphere.com/): Donator and active bug reporter/helper - **Kotyarendj**: Author of the current WATERFrAMES block textures - [**CoolDCB**](https://github.com/CoolDCB): Helping me backporting LittleFrames and motivating me to make my own mod - [**CreativeMD**](https://github.com/CreativeMD): For making LittleFrames inspiriting me. Having me patience on the PRs and begin a nice dude.
